The product launch parachute means that there's lots and lots of interactions throughout this entire process. So if something isn't perfect, you have time to recover. ## [09:03 - 10:01]

And that, but that doesn't mean you have to pull the product off the market. Lots of times I do pull the product off the market because of the nature of the way I teach product launch formula, but just because I do that doesn't mean you have to do it. There's lots of other ways to basically put that definitive end on your launch. So, I mean, you can close the cart, meaning that people can't buy from you, you can raise the price, bonuses can go away, but so there's different ways to do it, but you have to put that definitive end on your launch or else, you know, there's gonna be a lot of people that are sitting on the fence that don't take action unless you hold their feet to the fire and say, this is when you have to take action by.
